    MissionTypes:7DJ-UPpGjUC8jb28ml1Zfw

    label(PvP) Reputation (2-0)
    title(PvP) Reputation
    addedEnemies[]
    majorTypepvpChain
    descriptionGet 5 more kills. When you kill someone in PvP combat you gain reputation. If you're hostile and attacking other neutral players you'll get 'Pirate Reputation' - on the other hand, if you're not hostile, or act in defence of others, you'll get 'Police Reputation'.
